creator: bf2006a@yahoo.com
text:
diff -ruN smake.bak/Makefile smake/Makefile
--- smake.bak/Makefile	Tue Feb  6 20:18:19 2007
+++ smake/Makefile	Fri Mar 30 04:12:04 2007
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	smake
-PORTVERSION=	1.2.a.40
+PORTVERSION=	1.2.a.41
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.berlios.de/pub/smake/alpha/
 DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION:S/.a./a/}
@@ -22,6 +22,9 @@
 
 MAN1=		smake.1
 MAN5=		makefiles.5 makerules.5
+
+RULESUSED=	"`${LS} ${WRKSRC}/smake/OBJ/`"
+PLIST_SUB=	RULESUSED=${RULESUSED}
 
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
diff -ruN smake.bak/distinfo smake/distinfo
--- smake.bak/distinfo	Tue Feb  6 20:18:19 2007
+++ smake/distinfo	Wed Mar 28 17:55:26 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (smake-1.2a40.tar.bz2) = 4d91a99e9c1cece3e56b2ffa753e0dc5
-SHA256 (smake-1.2a40.tar.bz2) = e73d65baa039ac2fe0c8d481c9301982de47bc00fd1553a17e0a06aa21b4793a
-SIZE (smake-1.2a40.tar.bz2) = 313330
+MD5 (smake-1.2a41.tar.bz2) = 16ed2a07db8589a223a6aa0f66176078
+SHA256 (smake-1.2a41.tar.bz2) = 1f12e7b4f43e49e298b371caf96b7ed03536cbf6328d4ef10dd1f40b9f08ca35
+SIZE (smake-1.2a41.tar.bz2) = 322768
diff -ruN smake.bak/pkg-plist smake/pkg-plist
--- smake.bak/pkg-plist	Tue Feb  6 20:18:19 2007
+++ smake/pkg-plist	Wed Mar 28 19:32:54 2007
@@ -1,6 +1,9 @@
 bin/smake
-include/align.h
-include/avoffset.h
+include/schily/%%RULESUSED%%/align.h
+include/schily/%%RULESUSED%%/avoffset.h
+include/schily/%%RULESUSED%%/xconfig.h
+lib/defaults.smk
 lib/libschily.a
 lib/libschily_p.a
-lib/defaults.smk
+@dirrm include/schily/%%RULESUSED%%
+@dirrm include/schily

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
